disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute sensation of a lump in the throat with throat tightness that began about two hours ago this evening
trigger_question_examples: What are you feeling in your throat right now?
When did this start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It feels like there's a lump in my throat and it's tight, like I'm being choked. It came on suddenly a couple of hours ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Able to speak in full, uninterrupted sentences throughout the encounter
trigger_question_examples: Can you say a full sentence for me without stopping for breath?
Are you able to talk to me normally right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I can talk in full sentences, I'm not gasping between words, I'm just frightened.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high-pitched whistling or noisy sound audible on breathing in (patient-reported)
trigger_question_examples: When you breathe in, do you hear any high-pitched whistling or noisy sound?
Is there any harsh noise as you breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't hear any whistling or noisy sound when I breathe in — my breathing is quiet, just fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Able to swallow water when tried, despite subjective difficulty
trigger_question_examples: If you take a small sip of water, are you able to swallow it?
Can you swallow your own saliva, or does it feel completely blocked?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just tried a sip of water and I could swallow it, even though my throat feels really tight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuously pressing and palpating the front of the neck, which worsens the discomfort
trigger_question_examples: What are you doing with your hands right now?
Have you been touching your neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep pressing on my neck to feel the lump — I can't stop checking it, and it seems to make it feel worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known neck swelling with autoimmune thyroid antibodies on recent routine testing, told thyroid function is normal
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Has anyone looked into the lump in your neck before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had routine blood tests recently — they said I have some thyroid antibodies and a slightly enlarged thyroid, but that it's working normally and I don't need any medication.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing heart, fast breathing and acute panic accompanying the throat sensation
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Is your heart racing or are you breathing fast?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and I've been breathing really fast — I feel panicky and scared that something terrible is happening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blueness of the lips or face (patient-reported / video)
trigger_question_examples: Are your lips or face going blue or grey at all?
If you look in a mirror, is your colour normal or are your lips dusky?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my lips and face aren't blue — they look normal in the mirror.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hives, facial or lip swelling, or wheeze
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any hives, or swelling of your lips or face?
Any wheeze or new rash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No rash or hives, my lips and face aren't swollen, and I'm not wheezing — it's just this tight lump feeling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden change or hoarseness of the voice
trigger_question_examples: Has your voice suddenly gone hoarse or changed?
Does your voice sound normal to you right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my voice sounds normal to me — it hasn't gone hoarse or croaky.
